messages.content:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：我方自动射击，敌方也可以射击子弹。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。

modifications.prompt:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：我方自动射击，敌方也可以射击子弹。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。
modifications.code:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Auto Shooter Game</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        body {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%);
            font-family: 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        canvas {
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
            max-width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="gameCanvas"></canvas>
    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        
        // 设置 Canvas 尺寸
        canvas.width = 360;
        canvas.height = 640;

        // 游戏状态
        const GameState = {
            MENU: 'menu',
            PLAYING: 'playing',
            PAUSED: 'paused',
            GAMEOVER: 'gameover'
        };

        // 游戏变量
        let gameState = GameState.MENU;
        let score = 0;
        let highScore = parseInt(localStorage.getItem('highScore')) || 0;
        let lastTime = 0;
        let deltaTime = 0;

        // 玩家
        const player = {
            x: canvas.width / 2 - 15,
            y: canvas.height - 60,
            width: 30,
            height: 30,
            speed: 200,
            health: 3,
            shootTimer: 0,
            shootInterval: 0.5 // 自动射击间隔（秒）
        };

        // 子弹数组
        let playerBullets = [];
        let enemyBullets = [];

        // 敌人数组
        let enemies = [];

        // 输入状态
        const keys = {
            left: false,
            right: false,
            pause: false
        };

        // 初始化游戏
        function initGame() {
            player.x = canvas.width / 2 - player.width / 2;
            player.y = canvas.height - 60;
            player.health = 3;
            player.shootTimer = 0;
            playerBullets = [];
            enemyBullets = [];
            enemies = [];
            score = 0;
            gameState = GameState.PLAYING;
        }

        // 处理输入
        function handleInput(key, pressed) {
            if (key === 'ArrowLeft' || key === 'a') {
                keys.left = pressed;
            } else if (key === 'ArrowRight' || key === 'd') {
                keys.right = pressed;
            } else if (key === 'Escape' || key === 'p') {
                if (pressed && gameState === GameState.PLAYING) {
                    gameState = GameState.PAUSED;
                } else if (pressed && gameState === GameState.PAUSED) {
                    gameState = GameState.PLAYING;
                }
            } else if (key === 'Enter' || key === ' ') {
                if (pressed && gameState === GameState.MENU) {
                    initGame();
                } else if (pressed && gameState === GameState.GAMEOVER) {
                    initGame();
                }
            }
        }

        // 创建敌人
        function spawnEnemy() {
            if (Math.random() < 0.02) { // 控制敌人生成频率
                const enemy = {
                    x: Math.random() * (canvas.width - 30),
                    y: -30,
                    width: 30,
                    height: 30,
                    speed: 50 + Math.random() * 50,
                    shootTimer: Math.random() * 2,
                    shootInterval: 1 + Math.random() * 2 // 敌人射击间隔
                };
                enemies.push(enemy);
            }
        }

        // 更新游戏逻辑
        function update(deltaTime) {
            if (gameState !== GameState.PLAYING) return;

            // 更新玩家位置
            if (keys.left) {
                player.x -= player.speed * deltaTime;
            }
            if (keys.right) {
                player.x += player.speed * deltaTime;
            }
            // 边界检查
            player.x = Math.max(0, Math.min(canvas.width - player.width, player.x));

            // 玩家自动射击
            player.shootTimer += deltaTime;
            if (player.shootTimer >= player.shootInterval) {
                player.shootTimer = 0;
                playerBullets.push({
                    x: player.x + player.width / 2 - 2,
                    y: player.y,
                    width: 4,
                    height: 10,
                    speed: 300
                });
            }

            // 更新玩家子弹
            for (let i = playerBullets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                const bullet = playerBullets[i];
                bullet.y -= bullet.speed * deltaTime;
                if (bullet.y < -bullet.height) {
                    playerBullets.splice(i, 1);
                }
            }

            // 生成敌人
            spawnEnemy();

            // 更新敌人
            for (let i = enemies.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                const enemy = enemies[i];
                enemy.y += enemy.speed * deltaTime;

                // 敌人射击
                enemy.shootTimer += deltaTime;
                if (enemy.shootTimer >= enemy.shootInterval) {
                    enemy.shootTimer = 0;
                    enemyBullets.push({
                        x: enemy.x + enemy.width / 2 - 2,
                        y: enemy.y + enemy.height,
                        width: 4,
                        height: 10,
                        speed: 200
                    });
                }

                // 移除超出屏幕的敌人
                if (enemy.y > canvas.height) {
                    enemies.splice(i, 1);
                }
            }

            // 更新敌人子弹
            for (let i = enemyBullets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                const bullet = enemyBullets[i];
                bullet.y += bullet.speed * deltaTime;
                if (bullet.y > canvas.height) {
                    enemyBullets.splice(i, 1);
                }
            }

            // 碰撞检测：玩家子弹 vs 敌人
            for (let i = playerBullets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                const bullet = playerBullets[i];
                for (let j = enemies.length - 1; j >= 0; j--) {
                    const enemy = enemies[j];
                    if (bullet.x < enemy.x + enemy.width &&
                        bullet.x + bullet.width > enemy.x &&
                        bullet.y < enemy.y + enemy.height &&
                        bullet.y + bullet.height > enemy.y) {
                        // 击中敌人
                        playerBullets.splice(i, 1);
                        enemies.splice(j, 1);
                        score += 10;
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }

            // 碰撞检测：敌人子弹 vs 玩家
            for (let i = enemyBullets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                const bullet = enemyBullets[i];
                if (bullet.x < player.x + player.width &&
                    bullet.x + bullet.width > player.x &&
                    bullet.y < player.y + player.height &&
                    bullet.y + bullet.height > player.y) {
                    // 玩家被击中
                    enemyBullets.splice(i, 1);
                    player.health--;
                    if (player.health <= 0) {
                        gameState = GameState.GAMEOVER;
                        if (score > highScore) {
                            highScore = score;
                            localStorage.setItem('highScore', highScore);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            // 碰撞检测：敌人 vs 玩家
            for (let i = enemies.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                const enemy = enemies[i];
                if (enemy.x < player.x + player.width &&
                    enemy.x + enemy.width > player.x &&
                    enemy.y < player.y + player.height &&
                    enemy.y + enemy.height > player.y) {
                    // 玩家与敌人碰撞
                    enemies.splice(i, 1);
                    player.health--;
                    if (player.health <= 0) {
                        gameState = GameState.GAMEOVER;
                        if (score > highScore) {
                            highScore = score;
                            localStorage.setItem('highScore', highScore);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        // 渲染游戏
        function render() {
            // 清空画布
            ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a2e';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // 绘制得分
            ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
            ctx.font = '16px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('Score: ', canvas.width / 2 - 30, 30);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText(score, canvas.width / 2 + 20, 30);

            if (gameState === GameState.MENU) {
                // 菜单界面
                ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
                ctx.font = '24px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.fillText('Auto Shooter', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 40);
                ctx.font = '16px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.fillText('Press ENTER or SPACE to Start', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
                ctx.fillText('High Score: ' + highScore, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
            } else if (gameState === GameState.PLAYING || gameState === GameState.PAUSED) {
                // 绘制玩家
                ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
                ctx.fillRect(player.x, player.y, player.width, player.height);

                // 绘制玩家子弹
                ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
                for (const bullet of playerBullets) {
                    ctx.fillRect(bullet.x, bullet.y, bullet.width, bullet.height);
                }

                // 绘制敌人
                ctx.fillStyle = '#ff9f43';
                for (const enemy of enemies) {
                    ctx.fillRect(enemy.x, enemy.y, enemy.width, enemy.height);
                }

                // 绘制敌人子弹
                ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
                for (const bullet of enemyBullets) {
                    ctx.fillRect(bullet.x, bullet.y, bullet.width, bullet.height);
                }

                // 绘制生命值
                ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
                ctx.font = '14px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.textAlign = 'left';
                ctx.fillText('Health: ' + player.health, 10, 30);

                if (gameState === GameState.PAUSED) {
                    // 暂停界面
                    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';
                    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                    ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
                    ctx.font = '24px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
                    ctx.fillText('PAUSED', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
                    ctx.font = '16px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                    ctx.fillText('Press ESC or P to Resume', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
                }
            } else if (gameState === GameState.GAMEOVER) {
                // 游戏结束界面
                ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';
                ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
                ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
                ctx.font = '24px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.textAlign = 'center';
                ctx.fillText('GAME OVER', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 40);
                ctx.font = '16px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
                ctx.fillText('Score: ' + score, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
                ctx.fillText('High Score: ' + highScore, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 30);
                ctx.fillText('Press ENTER or SPACE to Restart', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 60);
            }
        }

        // 游戏循环
        function gameLoop(currentTime) {
            deltaTime = (currentTime - lastTime) / 1000;
            lastTime = currentTime;

            update(deltaTime);
            render();

            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
        }

        // 事件监听
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            handleInput(e.key, true);
        });

        document.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => {
            handleInput(e.key, false);
        });

        // 触摸控制（可选，用于移动设备）
        let touchStartX = 0;
        canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            touchStartX = e.touches[0].clientX;
            if (gameState === GameState.MENU || gameState === GameState.GAMEOVER) {
                initGame();
            }
        });

        canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            const touchX = e.touches[0].clientX;
            const diff = touchX - touchStartX;
            if (diff < -10) {
                keys.left = true;
                keys.right = false;
            } else if (diff > 10) {
                keys.right = true;
                keys.left = false;
            } else {
                keys.left = false;
                keys.right = false;
            }
            touchStartX = touchX;
        });

        canvas.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            keys.left = false;
            keys.right = false;
        });

        // 开始游戏循环
        requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
    </script>
</body>
</html>
